# promptloom

> Weave production-grade LLM prompts with cache boundaries, tool injection, and token budgeting.

Zero-dependency TypeScript library. Reverse-engineered from Claude Code's 7-layer prompt architecture.

## Install

```bash
npm install promptloom
```

Peer dependency: TypeScript ^6.0

## Quick Start

```ts
import { PromptCompiler, toAnthropic } from 'promptloom'

const pc = new PromptCompiler()

pc.zone(null)      // no-cache zone
pc.static('header', 'x-billing-org: org-123')

pc.zone('global')  // globally cacheable zone
pc.static('identity', 'You are a code review bot.')
pc.static('rules', 'Only comment on bugs, not style.')

pc.zone(null)      // session-specific zone (no cache)
pc.dynamic('diff', async () => `Review this diff:\n${await getDiff()}`)

// Conditional section — only included when predicate returns true
pc.static('thinking', 'Use extended thinking.', {
  when: (ctx) => ctx.model?.includes('opus') ?? false,
})

// Tool with explicit ordering for cache stability
pc.tool({
  name: 'post_comment',
  prompt: 'Post a review comment on a specific line.',
  inputSchema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      file: { type: 'string' },
      line: { type: 'number' },
      body: { type: 'string' },
    },
    required: ['file', 'line', 'body'],
  },
  order: 1,
})

// Deferred tool — excluded from system prompt, loaded on demand
pc.tool({
  name: 'web_search',
  prompt: 'Search the web.',
  inputSchema: { type: 'object', properties: { query: { type: 'string' } } },
  deferred: true,
})

const result = await pc.compile({ model: 'claude-opus-4-6' })
// result.blocks        → CacheBlock[] (one per zone)
// result.tools         → CompiledTool[] (inline only)
// result.deferredTools → CompiledTool[] (deferred)
// result.tokens        → { systemPrompt, tools, deferredTools, total }
// result.text          → full prompt string
```

## Provider Formatters

```ts
import { toAnthropic, toOpenAI, toOpenAIResponses, toBedrock, toGemini } from 'promptloom'

// Anthropic — cache-annotated blocks + tool schemas
const { system, tools } = toAnthropic(result)
await anthropic.messages.create({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', system, tools, messages, max_tokens: 4096 })

// OpenAI (also works with Groq, Together, DeepSeek, Mistral, Fireworks)
const { system, tools } = toOpenAI(result)
await openai.chat.completions.create({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, ...], tools })

// OpenAI Responses API
const { instructions, tools } = toOpenAIResponses(result)
await openai.responses.create({ model: 'gpt-4o', instructions, input: '...', tools })

// AWS Bedrock (Converse API)
const { system, toolConfig } = toBedrock(result)

// Google Gemini / Vertex AI
const { systemInstruction, tools } = toGemini(result)
await genai.models.generateContent({ model: 'gemini-2.5-pro', contents, config: { systemInstruction, tools } })
```

## API

### PromptCompiler

- `zone(scope: 'global' | 'org' | null)` — Start a new cache zone
- `boundary()` — Shorthand for `zone(null)` when enableGlobalCache is true
- `static(name, content, options?)` — Add static section. options.when for conditional inclusion
- `dynamic(name, compute, options?)` — Add dynamic section (recomputed every compile())
- `tool(def)` — Register tool. deferred: true for on-demand, order for sort stability
- `compile(context?)` — Compile to CompileResult. Context passed to when predicates
- `clearCache()` / `clearSectionCache()` / `clearToolCache()` — Cache invalidation
- `sectionCount` / `toolCount` — Counts
- `listSections()` / `listTools()` — Introspection

### CompileResult

- `blocks: CacheBlock[]` — One block per zone with cacheScope
- `tools: CompiledTool[]` — Inline tools with resolved descriptions
- `deferredTools: CompiledTool[]` — Deferred tools (defer_loading: true)
- `tokens: { systemPrompt, tools, deferredTools, total }` — Token estimates
- `text: string` — Full prompt joined

### Token Utilities

```ts
import { estimateTokens, estimateTokensForFileType, createBudgetTracker, checkBudget, parseTokenBudget } from 'promptloom'

estimateTokens('text')              // bytes / 4
estimateTokensForFileType('{}', 'json') // bytes / 2

const tracker = createBudgetTracker()
const decision = checkBudget(tracker, currentTokens, { budget: 100_000 })
// decision.action: 'continue' | 'stop'
// decision.reason: 'budget_reached' | 'diminishing_returns'

parseTokenBudget('+500k')  // 500_000
parseTokenBudget('2M')     // 2_000_000
```

### Low-level Exports

```ts
import {
  splitAtBoundary,  // Split text at sentinel → CacheBlock[]
  section,          // Create static Section
  dynamicSection,   // Create dynamic Section
  defineTool,       // Create ToolDef with defaults
  SectionCache,     // Section cache class
  ToolCache,        // Tool cache class
  resolveSections,  // Resolve sections against cache
  compileTool,      // Compile single tool
  compileTools,     // Compile all tools
} from 'promptloom'
```

## Key Concepts

1. **Zones** — Each zone compiles to a CacheBlock with its own cache scope (global, org, null). Changing content in one zone doesn't break cache for others.
2. **Conditional sections** — `when` predicates evaluated at compile time against user-provided context (model, env, user type, etc.).
3. **Tool ordering** — Use `order` field for deterministic tool serialization. Tools without order come last in insertion order.
4. **Deferred tools** — Marked tools excluded from system prompt, returned separately. Reduces token usage when many tools registered.
5. **Budget tracking** — For agent loops. Detects diminishing returns and budget exhaustion.

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/PeanutSplash/promptloom
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/promptloom
